instruction: Before making the call on Tokyo, check the latest review email note, the forecast, and today's Asia/Tokyo calendar. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send support@example.com the async update.
canonical_instruction: The latest review email note, the forecast, and today's Asia/Tokyo calendar don't line up cleanly for Tokyo. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send support@example.com the async update.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Tokyo contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-16
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-14 --cron '0 12 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Tokyo daily contradiction check'
